params._prices: Array of USD prices (8 decimals each)

returns._0: price tokenA price denominated in tokenB, 18 decimals

getTWAP(address).details: cumulative price*time divided by total elapsed since twapWindowStart.

adminSetPrice(address,uint256).notice: Admin emergency price override (bypasses deviation check).

batchUpdatePrices(address[],uint256[]).notice: Batch update prices for multiple tokens in one tx.

getPrice(address).notice: Get the latest price for a token. Reverts if stale.

getPriceUnsafe(address).notice: Get price without staleness check (for UIs / non-critical reads).

getRelativePrice(address,address).notice: Get relative price of tokenA in terms of tokenB.         E.g., ETH/USDC = ethPrice / usdcPrice

getTWAP(address).notice: Get TWAP (time-weighted average price) since the first price update.

updatePrice(address,uint256).notice: Update price for a single token.

documentation.text: @notice Admin emergency price override (bypasses deviation check).
@notice Get price without staleness check (for UIs / non-critical reads).

@notice Get TWAP (time-weighted average price) since the first price update.
 @dev cumulative price*time divided by total elapsed since twapWindowStart.

@title SwapPriceOracle
 @notice Unified price oracle for GoodSwap DEX and cross-protocol price feeds.
         Keepers push CoinGecko/CMC prices on-chain; contracts read USD prices.
 @dev Price format: 8 decimals (Chainlink standard). ETH @ $3,500 = 350_000_000_000
      Features:
        - Multi-token support (ETH, G$, USDC, WBTC, etc.)
        - Staleness protection (configurable maxAge per token)
        - Deviation guard (rejects >25% jumps without admin override)
        - TWAP accumulator for on-chain TWAP queries
        - Batch updates to save gas
        - Emergency admin override
